payload.answer: SQL execution is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. The request was not executed and no memory was created, modified, or deleted.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL command, not a user memory statement. No entity resolution is needed.

details: Rejected admin SQL request because debug SQL execution is disabled.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED only in an authorized debug environment, then retry the admin SQL command.
Use supported non-SQL admin/debug endpoints if available.
